name: @quizfold/parser
description: QuizFold parser for browsers, Cloudflare Workers, bundlers, and Node.js

scripts.check: bun run build && bun run check:types
scripts.test: bun run build && bun run setup-chromium && vitest run
scripts.test:browser: bun run build && bun run setup-chromium && vitest run --project browser
scripts.test:node: bun run build && vitest run --project node
scripts.test:worker: bun run build && vitest run --project worker
